entity: Kobe Bryant rolling 5-game scoring average on 2006-01-22 (the 81-point game): (81+37+48+50+28)/5 = 48.8 over his last five games per the BBR game log

query_target.sql: SELECT game_date, pts_roll5, pts_roll10 FROM mart_player_rolling WHERE player_id = 977 AND game_date = '2006-01-22' LIMIT 1

notes: Guards the Form Tracker's source table (mart_player_rolling). The rolling window includes the current game — verified against the hand-computed average of Kobe's five games ending 2006-01-22 (81, 50, 48, 37, 28 in some order per BBR). One clean row per (player_id, game_id); no agg-layer fan-out in this table.
